description: Build identity matrix and UPGMA tree placing PP_3571 among characterized M20 enzymes
code:
import requests, numpy as np
def seqf(u):
    f=requests.get(f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{u}.fasta",timeout=40).text
    return "".join(f.splitlines()[1:])

acc={
 "PP_3571(target)":"Q88GZ4",
 "PP_5186(ArgE?)":"Q88CJ5",
 "Ec_ArgE":"P23908",
 "Ec_DapE":"P0AED7",
 "PP_1525_DapE":"Q88MP5",
 "Human_ACY1":"P22760",     # aminoacylase-1
 "CPG2_Pseudomonas":"P06621", # carboxypeptidase G2
 "Ec_PepT_dipep":"P15288",  # peptidase T (M20B) outgroup
}
S={}
for n,a in acc.items():
    try: S[n]=seqf(a)
    except Exception as e: print("fail",n,a,e)
for n in S: print(n, len(S[n]))

def nw(a,b,match=2,mis=-1,gap=-2):
    n,m=len(a),len(b);H=np.zeros((n+1,m+1))
    for i in range(n+1):H[i,0]=i*gap
    for j in range(m+1):H[0,j]=j*gap
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        ai=a[i-1];row=H[i];prev=H[i-1]
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            s=match if ai==b[j-1] else mis
            row[j]=max(prev[j-1]+s,prev[j]+gap,row[j-1]+gap)
    i,j=n,m;A=[];B=[]
    while i>0 and j>0:
        s=match if a[i-1]==b[j-1] else mis
        if H[i,j]==H[i-1,j-1]+s:A.append(a[i-1]);B.append(b[j-1]);i-=1;j-=1
        elif H[i,j]==H[i-1,j]+gap:A.append(a[i-1]);B.append('-');i-=1
        else:A.append('-');B.append(b[j-1]);j-=1
    idt=sum(1 for x,y in zip(A,B) if x==y and x!='-');al=sum(1 for x,y in zip(A,B) if x!='-' and y!='-')
    return 100*idt/al

names=list(S.keys());n=len(names)
D=np.zeros((n,n))
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        pid=nw(S[names[i]],S[names[j]])
        D[i,j]=D[j,i]=100-pid
import pandas as pd
print("\n% identity matrix:")
print(pd.DataFrame(100-D,index=names,columns=names).round(1).to_string())

# NJ tree via scipy hierarchical clustering on distance
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, dendrogram
from scipy.spatial.distance import squareform
import matplotlib; matplotlib.use("Agg"); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
Z=linkage(squareform(D),method='average')
plt.figure(figsize=(9,4.5))
dendrogram(Z,labels=names,leaf_rotation=45)
plt.title("M20 family clustering (UPGMA, distance = 100 - % identity)")
plt.ylabel("distance"); plt.tight_layout(); plt.savefig("m20_tree.png",dpi=130)
print("\nsaved m20_tree.png")

# which characterized enzyme is closest to target?
ti=names.index("PP_3571(target)")
order=sorted([(100-D[ti,j],names[j]) for j in range(n) if j!=ti],reverse=True)
print("\nClosest neighbors of PP_3571:")
for p,nm in order: print(f"  {nm}: {p:.1f}%")
